'''Vio''' was the flag [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] onboard the [[Ocean (starship)|''Ocean'']] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. He operated the ''Ocean's'' main [[Comm unit/Legends|comm]] console during the [[Blockade of Corellia]], where he predicted to [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] that [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] and [[Rothana/Legends|Rothana]] would come to the aid of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] first. During the [[Second Battle of Fondor]], Vio put [[Cha Niathal]] into contact with [[Shas Vadde]] after [[Darth Caedus]]' bombing of [[Oridin City]].

==Personality and traits==
When Jacen Solo asked whether anyone was laying bets on who would come to Corellia's aid first, Vio, like most crew members, couldn't resist answering.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''
